scope: Sprint 4 hardened sandbox and deterministic failure reproduction
Sprint 5 enterprise Codex investigation orchestration and evidence-grounded diagnosis

validation.workspaceStructure: passed (13 workspaces and required enterprise paths)

deterministicEvaluation.note: known-output framework and guardrail evaluation; not a substitute for private live-model quality evaluation

validation.yamlParsing: passed for docker-compose.yml and all GitHub Actions workflows

dependencyAudit.policy: release gate fails on high or critical severity; moderate upstream transitive findings remain tracked

validation.prismaSchemaValidation: not executed locally because binaries.prisma.sh DNS resolution failed while Prisma attempted to download its schema engine
validation.databaseIntegration: Sprint 5 migration, RLS and persistence smoke suite implemented in CI; local execution requires PostgreSQL
validation.liveProviderEvaluation: not executed; requires a secret-managed OpenAI API key and sanitized private fixtures
validation.providerContract: strict Responses API JSON Schema, bounded output, timeout, usage accounting, redacted errors and response storage disabled by default
validation.promptInjectionBoundary: repository and incident content is isolated as untrusted evidence; tools are deterministic, read-only, agent-specific and audited
validation.grounding: diagnoses and plans require valid committed evidence citations and independent security/critic validation
validation.humanGovernance: service/system/agent decisions are rejected; production decisions require signed user sessions; distinct approver thresholds and duplicate-decision idempotency are implemented
validation.tenantIsolation: AI persistence uses tenant-scoped application queries and forced PostgreSQL RLS; cross-tenant smoke coverage is implemented
validation.durability: transactional outbox, leases, heartbeats, checkpoints, cancellation, resume and stale-run reconciliation are implemented
validation.readOnlyScope: Sprint 5 exposes no repository write, shell, GitHub mutation, approval or unrestricted network tools

enterpriseGate: closed pending PostgreSQL migration/RLS execution, private live-model evaluation, workforce OIDC/SCIM, managed signing keys and secrets, regional encrypted evidence storage, provider egress controls, SIEM integration, load/chaos/red-team testing and formal operational readiness review
